text:
--- On Fri, 7/18/08, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> 
> Please note that PR ports/125735 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a
> bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve
> the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

patch approved.
